games.name: Sink or Float
games.description: Embark on a fascinating journey into the world of physics with Sink or Float. This game is designed to challenge a youngsters understanding of buoyancy and mass in an entertaining way. The player is presented with various objects and their task is to predict whether these objects will sink or float when dropped into water. Each correct answer earns the player points, making the game engaging and educational.

games.description: A Scandinavian strategy board game that was popular in the Middle Ages. In Scandinavian society, it was comparable to chess. You can play the game with artificial intelligence, with another person on one device, or with an opponent online in multiplayer mode. The attacking black pieces move first.
